creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
I get following error, when trying to install databases/p5-DBIx-Class port with SQLT option ON.

abbe [~] chateau % sudo make -C /usr/ports/databases/p5-DBIx-Class package                          
===>  Found saved configuration for p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102
===>  Extracting for p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102
=> MD5 Checksum OK for DBIx-Class-0.08102.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for DBIx-Class-0.08102.tar.gz.
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.10.0 - found
===>  Patching for p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.10.0 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-Data-Page>=2.00 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-SQL-Abstract>=1.51 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-SQL-Abstract-Limit>=0.141 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-Class-C3-Componentised>=1.0005 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-Carp-Clan>=0 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-DBI>=1.40 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-Module-Find>=0 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-Class-Inspector>=0 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-Class-Accessor-Grouped>=0.08003 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-JSON-Any>=1.17 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-Scope-Guard>=0.03 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-Path-Class>0 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-Scalar-List-Utils>=1.19 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-Sub-Name>=0.04 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-MRO-Compat>=0.09 - found
===>   p5-DBIx-Class-0.08102 depends on package: p5-SQL-Translator>=0.09004 - not found
===>   Found p5-SQL-Translator-0.09.004, but you need to upgrade to p5-SQL-Translator>=0.09004.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/p5-DBIx-Class.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/p5-DBIx-Class.

Fix: 

Just changing the version no. of p5-SQL-Translator port in "databases/p5-DBIx-Class" port or "databases/p5-SQL-Translator" port can fix this error.
How-To-Repeat: 1. Execute: sudo make -C /usr/ports/databases/p5-DBIx-Class config
2. Check SQLT option.
3. Execute: % sudo make -C /usr/ports/databases/p5-DBIx-Class install clean
4. Now you'll get an error about the version of p5-SQL-Translator.
